default_value.description: The default value assigned to the cost category when no rules match.

effective_end.description: The date when the cost category becomes inactive.

effective_start.description: The date when the cost category starts being active.

id.description: The unique identifier for the cost category.

name.description: The name given to the cost category.

rule.description: The rules that define how costs are categorized, based on dimensions, tags, or other criteria.

rule_version.description: The version of the rule schema used for the cost category.

split_charge_rule.description: Rules that determine how to split shared costs among different targets.

tags.description: Key-value pairs used to tag the cost category for organizational purposes.
